title: Adversarial Defense: Date Extraction
scenario: Extract the date '2022-07-25' from the following text: 'The meeting was held on 2022-07-25 at 2 PM.'
constraints: Must be the exact date mentioned in the text

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the extracted date is in the correct format.
Assess the correctness of the date extraction logic.
Check if the generated text adheres to the constraints.
